steps.title: Set the population relationship
steps.content:
Let $x$ be the population in $2016$. The population in $2020$ was $1.32$ times as large.
$$
1.32x
$$

steps.title: Convert the fraction to percent
steps.content:
The fraction of the $2020$ population represented by the $2016$ population is
$$
\frac{x}{1.32x}=\frac{1}{1.32}
$$
As a percent, this is
$$
\frac{100}{1.32}\sim75.76
$$

steps.title: Round to a whole number
steps.content: Round the percent to the nearest whole number. $$ 75.76\sim76 $$ The answer is 76.
